pipeline_params.description: Weave Router (v0.27): cluster-routing over a 12-model BYOK pool spanning Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and OpenRouter providers. Embeds each prompt, scores against per-cluster model rankings trained on RouterArena's full split, and selects the cost-quality optimum via an alpha-blended score (alpha=0.40). The pool is intentionally multi-provider so a customer who only brings an OpenAI key still gets a 3-tier choice.
